data.body: Completion verification against landed commit 7650f579b returned FAIL. Genuine repository-evidence gaps remain for public lifecycle coverage: natural A-to-B-to-C transitive invalidation; depends_on plus inbound blocks canonical de-duplication; plan-review return-to-open reset; code-only close freshness; enable/disable/re-enable; and deleted/archived pinned targets. Existing public coverage already proves concurrency recheck and audited force-close, but the remaining cases require committed lifecycle tests. Story stays in_progress; no force-close. Follow-up implementation and Gerrit review are underway.
